subjects.description: experienced investor reviewing financial data at a wooden desk
subjects.appearance_details: composed professional with reading glasses, precise posture, and measured hand movements over organized papers
subjects.relationship: primary human subject making investment decisions in a private office
subjects.location: seated behind a polished wooden desk in the foreground
subjects.relative_size: medium human scale, dominant figure in the office composition
subjects.orientation: facing the desk at a slight angle, occasionally looking down through glasses
subjects.pose: seated upright with shoulders squared and hands near the papers and calculator
subjects.action: reviews financial statements, compares figures, and considers a strategic investment choice
subjects.state_changes: eyes scan columns, fingers adjust papers, hand taps the calculator, posture tightens with concentration
subjects.clothing: tailored dark suit, crisp shirt, understated tie, reading glasses
subjects.skin_tone_and_texture: natural office-lit skin with subtle facial lines and realistic texture
subjects.facial_features: defined jaw, neat hair, attentive eyes behind reading glasses

background_setting: Modern well-lit office with floor-to-ceiling windows overlooking a city skyline, polished wood surfaces, framed modern art, neatly stacked financial statements, pens, and a vintage mahogany calculator arranged with care.

lighting.conditions: Clean daylight from tall windows mixed with soft office fill, creating gentle reflections on glass, paper, polished wood, and the calculator.
lighting.direction: scene-appropriate key light from the most visible practical or natural source
lighting.shadows: soft scene-consistent shadows that ground subjects and objects
lighting.illumination_effect: Clean daylight from tall windows mixed with soft office fill, creating gentle reflections on glass, paper, polished wood, and the calculator.

aesthetics.composition: Refined corporate realism, warm mahogany against cool city glass, orderly documents, quiet wealth, and disciplined focus.
aesthetics.color_scheme: colors follow the source prompt and scene materials
aesthetics.mood_atmosphere: Refined corporate realism, warm mahogany against cool city glass, orderly documents, quiet wealth, and disciplined focus.

cinematography.camera_motion: Medium office shot from desk height with shallow focus on the investor, slow push-in across the papers, and skyline depth behind him.
cinematography.focus: main subject and key action remain sharp

artistic_style: Elegant modern business drama with crisp detail, controlled contrast, and calm decision-making tension.
context: An experienced investor studies financial statements in a high-rise office, using careful analysis before making a strategic investment decision.

actions.description: The investor sits at the polished desk, adjusts his reading glasses, and lowers his gaze to the financial statements.
He compares the printed figures, taps the vintage mahogany calculator, and slides one document closer.
He pauses with a concentrated look, steadies the paper stack, and appears to settle on a decision.

text_and_signage_elements.text: Financial statements show small printed tables, numbers, and column lines without readable specific words.
text_and_signage_elements.spatial_temporal: visible during the relevant shot interval

segments.description: Establish the bright office, city skyline, modern art, and investor seated at the wooden desk.
segments.key_changes: Glasses adjust, daylight catches the desk, documents become the visual focus.
segments.camera: Stable medium shot from desk height with a gentle push-in.

segments.description: Focus on the investor scanning papers and using the vintage calculator.
segments.key_changes: Paper edges shift, calculator keys depress, eyes move across data columns.
segments.camera: Close desk-level framing with shallow depth of field.

segments.description: Return to the investor as he pauses in focused decision-making.
segments.key_changes: Hand stills on the documents, expression settles into quiet confidence.
segments.camera: Medium close shot holding steady with skyline softly blurred.

temporal_caption: An experienced investor studies financial statements at a polished wooden desk, uses a vintage calculator, and settles into a strategic decision.
audio_description: Soft office ambience, faint city hum behind glass, paper rustle, subtle calculator clicks, and a quiet wooden desk tap.
